title: Zelda CD i Reanimated The Complete Saga (nintendobrad's account is closed)
description:
enjoy this once again!
nintendobrad's original description:
*PLEASE NOTE THIS VIDEO WAS REUPLOADED FROM MY PREVIOUS ACCOUNT*


Enjoy both parts of my Reanimated Poop series in one video. The art in Zelda's story is a bit better than Link's story. I drew all the pictures in this video. Please enjoy!


One more thing: This is not a poop. I just put those tags there for the huckuvit.
